positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandala pattern featuring bioluminescent tropical flora, intricate ferns, and celestial geometric elements. The design should be centered, forming a lush wreath or circular motif. Use a vibrant, deep jewel-tone palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted strongly with brilliant glowing gold and crisp black outlines. The style should blend Neo-Victorian botanical engraving with modern, psychedelic stained-glass geometry. High contrast, extreme detail, vector artwork feel, designed for continuous seamless printing, dramatic glowing backlighting, clean silhouette focus.
